summary: Bypassed the Solana guardian signature verification by spoofing the sysvar account, allowing arbitrary mints of wrapped ETH on Solana.
attack_trace: Submit verify_signatures with attacker-supplied sysvar instruction set
Mint 120k wETH on Solana without collateral on Ethereum
root_cause: Wormhole Solana program used a deprecated load_instruction_at without verifying sysvar instruction account, enabling forged guardian signatures.
